hero.description: Polycogni Capital is the First Hybrid Layer 2 Blockchain that introduces smart contracts to Bitcoin.

whatIs.title: WHAT IS POLYCOGNI CAPITAL?
whatIs.description: Polycogni Capital is a cryptocurrency project that seeks to unlock the full potential of the Bitcoin blockchain by bringing smart contracts and decentralized applications to Bitcoin.

unleash.title: Unleash the Bitcoin Trillion-Dollar Economy
unleash.subtitle: Most Bitcoin in circulation remains unutilized
unleash.point1: Laying the foundation for decentralized finance on Bitcoin
unleash.point2: Enabling smart contracts on the Bitcoin blockchain
unleash.point3: Unlocking new opportunities for value creation and driving the next generation of Bitcoin-based financial systems

why.title: Why Polycogni Capital?
why.scalabilityDesc: Helping to scale the Bitcoin blockchain with layer 2 technology and smart contracts
why.lowCostDesc: Reducing transaction costs to a fraction of what Bitcoin typically incurs
why.evmDesc: Bringing EVM compatibility to the most secure blockchain, allowing builders to port their applications to Bitcoin
why.trillionDesc: Bringing smart contracts to the trillion-dollar Bitcoin economy

stakingSection.title: Polycogni Capital Staking
stakingSection.subtitle: Polycogni Capital has created an awesome new staking system that rewards users who participate the most.
stakingSection.stepPlus: Participate in important protocol governance decisions

tokenomics.title: Tokenomics
tokenomics.description: Explore Polycogni Capital tokenomics; simple and effective. Our smart contracts are fully audited, enhancing safety and transparency. Dive into our Investment Trading Plan to discover more about how Polycogni Capital Trading works.

howToBuy.title: How to Buy
howToBuy.step1Desc: Create an Account with us or Connect your wallet to our website, Load Wallet With Crypto: Use BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC, or your preferred crypto
howToBuy.step2Desc: SELECT BITCOIN, ETHEREUM, USDT OR USDC AS THE INPUT CURRENCY AND ENTER THE AMOUNT YOU WANT TO SPEND, THEN SELECT POLYCOGNI CAPITAL AS THE OUTPUT CURRENCY.
howToBuy.step3Desc: Review the transaction details and confirm the swap, then wait for the transaction to process and receive your Polycogni Capital tokens

dev.desc1: Our easy to integrate library allows developers to build Polycogni Apps in minutes.
dev.desc2: Don’t miss the chance to build the next generation of blockchain applications.
dev.communityTitle: Join the Growing Community of Developers

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: The Future of Bitcoin Layer 2, Polycogni Capital is a state-of-the-art layer 2 solution that aims to address the scalability challenges faced by Bitcoin: By leveraging advanced scaling mechanisms such as state channels, sidechains, and blockchain rollups, Polycogni Capital enhances transaction speed and reduces fees, making Bitcoin and Ethereum more accessible and efficient for users worldwide
faq.a2:
Polycogni Capital is positioned at the intersection of Bitcoin security and next generation blockchain innovation. By introducing smart contract capabilities and decentralized applications to the Bitcoin ecosystem, we aim to unlock new possibilities for developers, investors, and global users.

Our focus is on long-term value creation through:
• Scalable and efficient blockchain infrastructure
• Strategic development and continuous innovation
• A growing ecosystem designed for real-world adoption

As the digital asset space continues to evolve, Polycogni Capital seeks to be part of the transformation shaping the future of global finance.
faq.a3: Layer 2 is a solution built on top of the Bitcoin and Ethereum Network, offering faster and cheaper transactions, enabling double staking rewards for Polycogni Capital.
faq.q4: How Do I Buy Polycogni Capital Tokens?
faq.a4: Create an Account with us or Connect your wallet to our website. Load Wallet With Crypto: Use BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC, or your preferred cryptocurrency. Buy $PC, select your payment method, and opt to buy your token.
faq.q5: When Can I Claim My Tokens?
faq.a5: After your first purchase of Polycogni Capital tokens, you will see your allocation on the Polycogni Capital Dashboard. The token will be sent to you on the blockchain.
faq.q6: Can I also invest in the company without Purchasing Polycogni Capital?
faq.a6: Yes, you can invest with us without purchasing Polycogni Capital.

tradingBots.text1: Users can purchase AI powered bot licenses for automated trading across various markets.
tradingBots.text2: Earn passive income from the successful trades executed by your AI trading bots.
tradingBots.text3: Users can buy, sell, and trade AI bot licenses as NFTs on our marketplace, ensuring true asset ownership.
